upcoming_events.notes: Due for comprehensive blood work and biometric screening.
Interested in adding dental coverage for the kids next year.

aiSummary: David Miller is a Platinum Member and 'Proactive Family Protector' managing a family plan with high engagement in pediatric and preventive care. He is currently seeking a physical therapist for a sports injury and has shown recent frustration regarding a lab bill he expected to be covered under preventive services. Given his recent queries about adding a newborn and his frequent use of the claims tracker, the concierge should focus on resolving the billing discrepancy and assisting with provider searches for his injury.

nextActions.title: Resolve Lab Claim Discrepancy
nextActions.description: Investigate the lab bill mentioned in chat logs to ensure it was processed correctly as preventive care and explain the status of his deductible.

nextActions.title: Specialist Referral Support
nextActions.description: Provide a curated list of in-network physical therapists and chiropractors in the 78701 area for his sports injury.

nextActions.title: Policy Update Guidance
nextActions.description: Proactively share the documentation requirements and timeline for adding a newborn to the Family Plus policy.

marketingActivity.details: Searched find-a-doctor tool for local providers.
